steps.title: Write the multipliers
steps.content:
If $a$ is $65\%$ less than $b$, then $35\%$ of $b$ remains.
$$a=0.35b$$
If $c$ is $40\%$ greater than $a$, then
$$c=1.40a$$

steps.title: Combine the changes
steps.content:
Substitute $a=0.35b$ into $c=1.40a$.
$$c=1.40(0.35b)=0.49b$$
So $c$ is $0.49$ times $b$. The answer is .49.
